name: SBI Card ELITE
exclusions: transactions excluded under SBI Card reward terms
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 4 lakh
15,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
15,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 8 lakh
Renewal fee waived on annual spends of Rs 10 lakh
additionalBenefits: Welcome e-Gift Voucher worth Rs 5,000 from select brands
5X Reward Points on dining, departmental stores and grocery spends
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 on other spends
Movie ticket benefits worth up to Rs 6,000 per year
8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership with 6 international lounge visits per calendar year, capped at 2 per quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver across petrol pumps, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
